tool_input.command: which google-chrome chromium-browser chromium 2>/dev/null; ls /Applications/Google\ Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/ 2>/dev/null; ls /Applications/Chromium.app/Contents/MacOS/ 2>/dev/null
CHROME_PATH=$(find /Applications -name "Google Chrome" -type f 2>/dev/null | head -1); echo "$CHROME_PATH"; ls /Applications/ | grep -i chrome 2>/dev/null

cd /Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/bdf67753/web-components && npx playwright install chromium 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; npx wtr test/hydrate.test.js --node-resolve --playwright --browser chromium 2>&1 | tail -20

cd /Users/auto/agentic-harness/apps/mas/trees/bdf67753/web-components && CHROME_PATH="/tmp/chrome-for-testing/chrome/mac-146.0.7680.165/chrome-mac-x64/Google Chrome for Testing.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome for Testing" npx wtr test/hydrate.test.js --node-resolve 2>&1
